findings.check: ATLAS heartbeat parse (health, GI, anomalies, EVE tension)
findings.detail: Reviewed 20260326T090259Z.json: health=degraded, composite=0.73, anomalies=2, gi=0.83 mode=green, eve.global_tension=high, dominant_region=Global. Endpoints micro_agents, integrity, eve_news all true.

Live fetch ~2026-03-26T10:01:12Z: composite 0.721 (within ~0.01 of heartbeat 0.73). anomalies[] still lists two elevated signals: GAIA/USGS (51 quakes M2.5+, max M5.6 La Ligua, Chile) and DAEDALUS-µ Self-ping HTTP 401 in 40ms. Count and identity match ATLAS anomaly count of 2. THEMIS block shows sourceStatus data.gov official=failed and last-good-cache=failed while Federal Register and data.gov catalog remain ok — upstream catalog strain without failing the agent block.
Both ATLAS-era anomalies remain in the live anomalies list — persistent. Composite and severities are stable (elevated, not escalating to critical). No new anomaly types observed in this snapshot.

source=mock — GI is not production-trustworthy for verification. global_integrity=0.83, mode=green, terminal_status=nominal; signals include freshness=0.6 and information=0.6 (degraded vs perfect 1.0), consistent with partial signal strain but the mock driver dominates interpretability. kv=false aligns with non-persistent integrity path.

findings.check: Vercel deployment health (READY, ERROR in 6h, ignoreCommand)
findings.detail: No Vercel CLI auth or VERCEL_TOKEN in this environment; deployment READY state, ERROR deployments in the last six hours, and ignoreCommand behavior for bot commits could not be verified. Production HTTPS routes for signals, integrity-status, and EVE returned 200 at verification time.

findings.check: EVE /api/eve/global-news vs GI and micro anomalies
findings.detail: global_tension=high with geopolitical-heavy feed while integrity-status shows mode=green and terminal_status=nominal — possible narrative disconnect, amplified because GI is mock-sourced. Article timestamps in the feed are 2022-era, so tension labeling may reflect stale curated content rather than live world state. Seismic elevation and Self-ping 401 are infrastructure or natural-hazard signals, not explained by EVE headlines.

eve_correlation: High global_tension thematically matches geopolitical items but does not explain USGS composite anomaly or Self-ping 401. Stale EVE dates weaken real-time correlation; persistent micro anomalies are better read as environmental and app-auth/health-check behavior than as EVE-driven.
recommendation: ATLAS degraded health is consistent with two persistent elevated micro signals and slightly sub-unity composite. Treat GI as unverified until integrity-status source is live. Re-run ZEUS with Vercel API credentials to validate deployment READY, recent ERROR builds, and ignoreCommand on bot commits. Document or fix intentional Self-ping 401 if expected; monitor THEMIS data.gov official and last-good-cache failures.
